sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
The Dinosaur Egg is an artifact and an animal product .
Initially, a Dinosaur Egg can be found by digging up an Artifact Spot in The Mountains (including the Quarry ), in Fishing Treasure Chests after reaching Fishing level 2 and having previously found at least one artifact , dropped from a Pepper Rex , foraged on Prehistoric Floors in the Skull Cavern , or won in the Crane Game in the Movie Theater . Dinosaur Egg can also be gifted by a pet dog with max friendship .
Dinosaur Eggs can be put into an incubator in a Big or Deluxe Coop to hatch a Dinosaur ≈11 days later (≈6 days with the Coopmaster Profession ). Mature and fed dinosaurs will produce Dinosaur Eggs every 7 days.

sections.heading: Donation
sections.content:
Donation of this item contributes to the total count of donations for the Museum .
Tip: Placing the first Dinosaur Egg found into an incubator instead of donating it to the Museum will ensure that the player both obtains a Dinosaur and completes the Museum collection.

sections.heading: Artisan Goods
sections.content: Dinosaur Eggs can be used to make the following Artisan Good .

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: Dinosaur Egg is not used in any bundles .

sections.heading: Recipes
sections.content: Dinosaur Egg is not used in any recipes.

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: A Dinosaur Egg can be used in the spool of the Sewing Machine to create the Dinosaur Hat . It can be used in dyeing , serving as a green dye at the dye pots located in Emily 's and Haley 's house, 2 Willow Lane . It can also be used as a green dye when used in the spool of the Sewing Machine with a dyeable clothing item in the feed.

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content: - "Gus' Famous Omelet" : On the Special Orders board in front of the Mayor's Manor , Gus may randomly request that the player collect and deliver 24 Eggs (of any type) to the fridge in the Stardrop Saloon . The reward is data-sort-value="3000"> 3,000g and a Mini-Fridge .

sections.heading: Secret
sections.content: After hatching the first Dinosaur Egg, Demetrius will gift the player a Triple Shot Espresso .

sections.heading: References
sections.content: ↑ See AnimalHouse::adoptAnimal in the game code, and the entry for purchasedAnimal_Dinosaur in Characters/Dialogue/Demetrius.xnb in the data files.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.0 : Introduced.
- 1.4 : Introduced Dinosaur Mayonnaise -- prior to this, putting Dinosaur Eggs into a Mayonnaise Machine resulted in gold-quality Mayonnaise . Added as drop from Pepper Rex , Crane Game prize, and foraged on Prehistoric Levels. Can now be used in Tailoring .
- 1.5 : Artifacts are now liked by the Dwarf and Penny , disliked by all other NPCs. Can be used for a Special Order .
- 1.6 : Dinosaur Egg is now liked by Demetrius and Alex. Can now be gifted by a pet dog with max friendship . Dinosaur Egg sell values are now modified by the Treasure Appraisal Guide.

rows: A giant dino egg... The entire shell is still intact!
